## Problem

State the observed repository or reader problem and the evidence that establishes it.

## Changes

List the changed contracts, boundaries, and any user-visible behavior.

## Test plan

List the commands or fixtures that prove the change, including one negative case when a boundary changed.

## AI disclosure

- [ ] No AI assistance was used.
- [ ] AI assistance was used and this pull request states the human-reviewed evidence and test plan.

Use a `Co-authored-by:` trailer only when it accurately records the contribution.
